items.title: mike
items.description: OSS AI Legal Platform
items.summary: Mike is an AI legal platform for document analysis and contract review. It offers an open-source alternative to proprietary tools, allowing full control over the models used. It features a chat interface for document review and contract drafting.

items.summary: The toolkit includes a protocol replay tool for ChatGPT subscriptions, an hCaptcha solver, and anti-fraud research data. Pricing details for various plans are available on the official website. This information is based on publicly available data.

items.title: dictionary-of-ai-coding
items.description: AI coding jargon, explained in plain English.
items.summary: AI coding jargon includes terms like "model," "sessions," and "tool calls," explained simply as the tools and processes used to make AI systems work. "Context windows" refer to the current information available to the AI. "Hallucinations" are incorrect outputs from the AI.

items.title: AIbijia
items.description: 分享便宜靠谱Token，抹平信息差
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. AIbijia shares affordable and reliable tokens. It aims to reduce information disparity.

items.title: awesome-deepseek-agent
items.summary: The GitHub repository "awesome-deepseek-agent" has 119 stars and 12 forks. It includes guides for various tools and has 10 open issues. The latest version of OpenCode should be upgraded to v1.14.24 or higher.

items.title: reversa
items.description: Transform legacy systems into executable specifications for AI coding agents
items.summary: Reversa is a framework that transforms legacy systems into executable specifications for AI coding agents by analyzing existing code and generating traceable specifications. It coordinates AI agents to produce operational contracts without modifying original files. The quality of the output depends on the clarity of existing documentation and code.

items.title: openless
items.description: Hold a key, speak, release — AI-polished text appears at your cursor in any app. Open-source voice input for macOS & Windows. (按住快捷键说话，松开即得润色后的文字)
items.summary: OpenLess is an open-source voice input tool for macOS and Windows that converts spoken words into polished text. It uses AI to refine and insert text at the cursor. It has over 200 stars on GitHub.

items.title: club-3090
items.description: Community recipes for serving LLMs on RTX 3090. Multi-engine (vLLM, llama.cpp, SGLang) and model-agnostic. Currently shipping Qwen3.6-27B configs for 1× and 2× cards.
items.summary: Serving LLMs on RTX 3090s uses vLLM, llama.cpp, and SGLang. Qwen3.6-27B configs are available for 1× and 2× cards. Recipes are multi-engine and model-agnostic.

items.title: library-skills
items.description: Library Agent Skills
items.summary: Library agents define skills in libraries to automate tasks, ensuring best practices and security. Skills are found in `.agents/skills/` directories. Agents use these skills to follow library-defined practices.

items.title: bux
items.description: A 24/7 Claude Code agent with Browser Harness, on any box you own.
items.summary: BUX is a 24/7 remote agent with a real browser, running on any Ubuntu-based VPS. It includes Claude Code and Browser Harness. It's hosted on GitHub.

items.summary: A universal skill for generating realistic images is a compact agent skill that transforms short prompts into lifelike GPT Image 2 visuals. It enhances photo realism and is available on GitHub. This skill is highly effective for creating authentic images from text descriptions.

items.title: compose-performance-skills
items.description: ⚡️ A curated library of Agent Skills focused on Jetpack Compose performance.
items.summary: Compose-performance-skills is a library of Agent Skills for Jetpack Compose, focusing on performance. It follows the open Agent Skills standard and is community-driven, not managed by Google's CLI. Use it to enhance Compose app performance.

items.summary: Baguette is a headless iOS 26 simulator manager with 60 fps streaming and host-side input injection for taps, swipes, and multi-finger gestures. It supports boot/shutdown without the Simulator app.

items.title: agent-to-merchant-payments
items.description: Payments are broken for AI agents.  Snaplii unlocks real-world commerce with a safe, tokenized payment layer — powered by 500+ merchant gift cards — and is the only one that actually saves you money (up to 10% per transaction), on top of any existing deals or promotions.
items.summary: Snaplii offers a tokenized payment layer for AI agents, providing discounts up to 10% on top of existing deals. Payments are currently functional, and users report quick access to gift cards and cashback. Snaplii's service is unique in saving users money.

items.title: spawn-agent

items.summary: Spawn-agent is a tool that deploys local agents on a user's computer. It is available on GitHub and operates in isolated environments. This ensures no cross-contamination or side effects.

items.title: RecursiveMAS
items.description: Offical Implementation for "Recursive Multi-Agent Systems"
items.summary: RecursiveMAS is a framework for scaling multi-agent systems through recursive computation, using a RecursiveLink module for agent collaboration. It improves accuracy, speeds up inference, and reduces token usage. The framework optimizes through an inner-outer loop learning algorithm.

items.title: agentswift
items.summary: AgentSwift is a framework for automated design of AI agents, utilizing value-guided hierarchical search. It's used for developing autonomous coding agents, especially for Apple platform development. The latest version focuses on efficiency in large language model agent design.

AI is now widely used for incident response, helping SREs navigate and draft actions. AI agents are replacing traditional runbooks to reduce repetitive tasks.

items.title: clawd.rip
items.description: Everything that *went* wrong with Claude.
items.summary: Several issues affected Claude, including controversies and operational problems at Anthropic. The project clawd.rip documents these incidents. The project is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: OpenMonoAgent.ai
items.description: AI shouldn't have a meter. Unlimited tokens. Forever. Your machine. Your agent. Use it from anywhere. Terminal-native coding agent powered by local LLMs — 100% open source, free forever, and installed with a single command. Proudly built on C#/.NET, because AI tooling should be infrastructure, not a subscription.
items.summary: OpenMonoAgent.ai is a free, open-source coding agent built on C#/.NET, running locally without subscription fees or token limits. It's installed with a single command and operates on your hardware. It's designed to be infrastructure you own, not a rented service.

items.summary: AI-powered agents like Bug-Bounty-Agents and PentestAgent assist in ethical hacking, red teaming, and bug bounty pentesting. They automate vulnerability discovery and attack simulations. These tools are designed for legal and ethical security research.
